group_1.textCenter: (I should be safe if I'm this far away, but...)
(I wonder if she split off on purpose to lead that@Nagisa girl away...?)
(...Even if we were together, it's not as if I'd be@able to do anything to help her...)
(...but that appears to be a possibility for@Magical Girls...)

group_1.textRight: Hello, Shii.
Are you ready to make a contract and become@a Magical Girl yet?

group_1.textLeft: Kyubey... Long time, no see.
And you're just as stress-free as always...
I still can't trust you, after all.

group_1.textRight: Stress, huh... Well, I do have a mountain@of problems.
Unfortunately, my kind lacks emotions.
With that out of the way...
...let's pick up where we left off before@the Sleepwalking Ghost comes back.
If you make a contract with me to become@a Magical Girl and have a wish granted...
...your nightmares can finally come to an end.
Incidents like that pointless fight with@the organized crime group earlier...
...won't happen anymore if your nightmares@disappear.
Plus, don't you think it would be more@beneficial...
...to protect good citizens from the threat@of Witches...
...than it would be to carry out sanctions@against humanity for your own satisfaction?
Speaking of which, I'm a little surprised.
Is there a reason why you keep letting the@Sleepwalking Ghost commit murders?
Based on your abilities and testimony...
...I assume that she appears in your nightmares@herself, no?

group_1.textLeft: Let me know if I show up in your dreams, okay?
I'm a bad person, so it's bound to happen@eventually.
And then I'll get rid of myself, too.

group_1.textRight: Mm... Understood. I'll make sure to tell you@if the time comes...

group_1.narration: I have told you exactly one lie.
I don't care how many times you kill me.
No matter how deeply I fear@or hate you in my dreams...
...that, too, is a sign of our bond...
And yet I've never been able@to repay you for anything.

group_1.textLeft: ...I want to protect Yuu.

group_1.textRight: As in...the Sleepwalking Ghost?

group_1.textLeft: Up until now— and even now— Yuu has been@watching over me.
She calls me by my name, not "teacher" or@"parishioner."
Because she took my hand...
...I was able to think about the reason why I was@born.
Even if this isn't the right answer, Yuu is still my@hope...
But I'm just taking advantage of her kindness...
...and letting her shoulder the weight of@my crimes.
I at least want to become a Magical Girl so I can@share the burden with her...
If I make a contract, will I be able to protect Yuu?

group_1.textRight: I don't know why you'd want to do that, but sure,@that should be easy.
Well, alright. If you've decided that you want@to go through with this...
...what will your wish be?

group_1.textLeft: I want to know...not just other people's pain@and worries...
...but their hopes and happiness, too.
Not something flimsy and insignificant...
...like what I carry inside.
Kuroe-san told me about someone who saved@people indiscriminately...
...regardless of whether they were good or bad.
I want to know the love in the heart of someone@like that.

group_1.textRight: So you want to broaden the scope of information@you can pick up with your ability?
Haven't you been plagued by nightmares because@of that same power, though?

group_1.textLeft: Once I can understand the meaning of the hopes@and emotions...
...that Magical Girls have...
...I'd never give up or pin the blame on somebody@else again.
I could commit sins with Yuu entirely of my own@volition.
In my dreams...
...I could synchronize with all of the hopes and@anguish...
...of both those who are victimized and those@who have made mistakes.
I'd be able to kill someone who could have@been me.

group_1.textRight: I don't want you to go after humans.
I just want you to defeat Witches.
Besides...
I thought you hated your nightmares, didn't you?

group_1.textLeft: Even if my nightmares never stop...
...if I could just find the right hope...
If I could see the love in that person's heart...
...and convey my own hopes, so huge and hideous,@to them...
Then no matter how futile or cursed our path@may be...
...by my own strength, I can still take their hand@and lead them into tomorrow.
Yuu and I can continue our mistaken steps@forward together.

group_1.textRight: I can grant you your wish.
But that's not your duty as a Magical Girl.
You can still become whatever kind of Magical Girl@you want.

group_1.textLeft: I doubt you'll understand...
...but it's too late for her and I.
Please grant me this wish, Kyubey...
"I want to connect with other people's hearts."

group_1.textRight: Understood. The contract is sealed.

group_1.narration: [textBlack:"I want to know what's in their hearts...]@[textBlack:so that I can continue to make mistakes..."]

group_1.textLeft: Did...my wish come true...?

group_1.textRight: Naturally.
I don't know the specifics of how it was granted,@though.

group_1.textLeft: Then...let me test it out on you first...
